purpose: Entry manifest for octoparse-lead-generation shortlist. Read request-classifier.md first, then load the core shortlist. Load the regional shortlist only when geography, language, or source-specific signals require it.
selection_rules: Prefer this shortlist over the full category page.
Keep recommendations narrow and default to the primary template for each track.
Treat review templates as enrichment, not discovery.
Do not treat product or generic review templates as lead-generation defaults.
For Google Maps, default to template 1577 for discovery and 941 only when reviews are explicitly needed.
Whenever an upstream template can provide a website URL, prefer Contact Details Scraper as the default enrichment template.
For b2b-company-leads, prefer Google Search Scraper when contact details are not required, and prefer Google Search Email Finder (Premium) when contact details are required.
regional_trigger_signals: The user explicitly names a country, region, or city outside the default English/global path
The user asks for Japan, Germany, France, or other locale-specific directories
The core shortlist does not satisfy the geography or language requirement
The user needs a source-specific directory such as Itown, Gelbe Seiten, 11880.com, PagesJaunes, or HelloAsso
